memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir William de Traci or Tracy (Baron Brandninch)
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir William was born about 1133 at Sudley Castle, Sudley Manor,  Gloucestershire, England. his parents were William de Tracy and Alice de Normandie.   In due time he married Hawise de Bourne in 1165 i …

popularStory.headline: Sir William de Traci or Tracy (Baron Brandninch)
popularStory.description: Sir William was born about 1133 at Sudley Castle, Sudley Manor,  Gloucestershire, England. his parents were William de Tracy and Alice de Normandie.   In due time he married Hawise de Bourne in 1165 i …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Tracy於1133年出生在英國賀特福爾賀特福德時，他的父親John De Sudeley18歲，母親Grace de Tracy28歲。他於1165年與Hawise Bourne在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1210年在英國賀特福爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文莫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Tracy于1133年出生在英国賀特福爾賀特福德时，他的父亲John De Sudeley18岁，母亲Grace de Tracy28岁。他于1165年与Hawise Bourne在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1210年在英国賀特福爾享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文莫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Tracy was born in 1133, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John De Sudeley, was 18 and his mother, Grace de Tracy, was 28. He married Hawise Bourne in 1165, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1210, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Mortehoe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Tracy est né en 1133, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Sudeley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Grace de Tracy, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Bourne en 1165, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1210, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Mortehoe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Tracy 1133 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Sudeley 18 und seine Mutter Grace de Tracy 28. Er hat 1165 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Hawise Bourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Mortehoe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Tracy è nato il nel 1133 nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John De Sudeley, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Grace de Tracy, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Bourne nel 1165, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1210, nel Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Mortehoe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Tracyが1133年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで生まれた時，父John De Sudeleyは18歳，母Grace de Tracyは28歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでHawise Bourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1210年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンモーテhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Tracy(이)가 1133년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Sudeley(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace de Tracy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Hawise Bourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1210년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모르테호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Tracy nasceu em 1133, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Sudeley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Grace de Tracy, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Bourne em 1165, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1210, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Mortehoe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Tracy родился в 1133 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Sudeley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace de Tracy, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Bourne в 1165 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1210 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности мортэо, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Tracy nació en 1133, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Sudeley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Grace de Tracy, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Hawise Bourne en 1165, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1210, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Mortehoe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
